§6Crafting Storage§f:
The §6Crafting Storage §funits are §emultiblock components §f of the §6Crafting CPU§f. They provide §bintermediate ingredient storage §f for §6multistep autocrafting §f jobs.

§6Crafting Storage Family§f:
- §b1k Crafting Storage §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_storage_1k) — §b1,024 §f items
- §b4k Crafting Storage §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_storage_4k) — §b4,096 §f items
- §b16k Crafting Storage §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_storage_16k) — §b16,384 §f items
- §b64k Crafting Storage §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_storage_64k) — §b65,536 §f items

§6Production Path (network/crafting/cpu_crafting_storage_1k.json)§f:
The §6Crafting Storage 1k §frecipe is shapeless with 2 ingredients:
- 1× §6Crafting Unit §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_unit) — the §6CPU core §f
- 1× §6§61k§r ME Storage Component §f(appliedenergistics2:material:35)
- Yields 1× Crafting Storage 1k

The 4k variant uses §6§e4k§r ME Storage Component §f(appliedenergistics2:material:36), 16k uses §6§a16k§r §f(appliedenergistics2:material:37), etc.

§6Function§f:
- §bIntermediate storage §f: holds ingredients in the middle of a §6multistep §f crafting job
- §bAuto-pulled by Molecular Assembler §f: when a Molecular Assembler needs an ingredient, it pulls from the §bnearest §fCrafting Storage first
- §bMultiblock §f: place on the §binner walls §f of a §6Crafting CPU §f's 3×3×3 multiblock

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Crafting Storage is a component of, but it is referenced in 240 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bMultistep crafting §f: a §6crafting job §f with 3+ steps needs Crafting Storage
- §bBulk intermediates §f: a §6§a16k§r Crafting Storage §f can hold all intermediates for a §6steel-ingot §f chain

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: start with §b1-2 §fCrafting Storage 4k units in your first Crafting CPU; expand to §b16k §f once you have a §6powerful §f network
- §eTip§f: place §6Crafting Storage §f units on the §6inner walls §f of the 3×3×3 multiblock; the §6Crafting Unit §f core is in the centre
- §eTip§f: pair with a §6Crafting Monitor §f to see §6real-time §f intermediate counts
- §cWarning§f: a Crafting CPU with §cno §fCrafting Storage will §cfail §f any craft that requires intermediate ingredients
- §cWarning§f: a §6Crafting Storage §f unit §cdoes not §f count as a §6Storage Cell §f; you cannot place §6items §f in it from the §6ME Terminal §f
